review_summary: DeepSeek confirmed the 472-line root and four extracted modules at 283/26/207/202 lines are all below 500; public exports are preserved; manifest validation, runnable selection, governance gates, provider/model-routed completion authority, local bounded rejection, workspace mutation guard, already-satisfied preflight, artifact ledger, project-status sync, lifecycle facts, and dispatch staging/failure persistence remain locatable and behavior-preserving.
